title: calamintha uhligii
intro: Calamintha uhligii, also known as mountain basil or blue melissa, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Central and Eastern Europe. It possesses anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Calamintha uhligii include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Calamintha uhligii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, as well as used topically as a skin toner or wound healer.
